title: Agent Invoked Event
description: Emitted when a subagent is spawned (task-verifier, code-reviewer, UX tester, etc.).

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the agent was invoked.

session_id.description: Unique identifier for the parent session.

invocation_id.description: Unique identifier for this agent invocation.

agent_name.description: Name of the agent file or skill (e.g., 'task-verifier', 'code-reviewer', 'ux-end-user-tester').

trigger.description: What caused the agent to be invoked (e.g., 'task-completion', 'pre-commit', 'user-request').

input_summary.description: Brief summary of what was passed to the agent (plan file, task ID, files list).

status.description: Current status of the agent invocation.

result.description: Verdict returned by the agent, if applicable.

duration_ms.description: Total execution time in milliseconds. Null if still running.

tokens_used.description: Approximate token count consumed by the agent invocation.

files_examined.description: List of file paths the agent read or inspected.

findings_count.description: Number of findings or issues reported by the agent.

project.description: Project name from the working directory.
